---
title: "Ethics and Game Theory"
description: "Ethical dilemmas formalized, fairness, moral uncertainty, conventions, norms."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <div class="kicker"><span data-topic-count="ethics-and-game-theory"></span> TUTORIALS</div>
  <h1>Ethics and Game Theory</h1>
  <p class="lead">Ethical dilemmas formalized, fairness, moral uncertainty, conventions, norms.</p>
</div>
```
